case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s cartservice metrics. Latency.p90 dev=+2.8 in 30-60s window confirms internal latency anomaly. High log counts for GetCartAsync/AddItemAsync suggest workload pressure. No trace evidence points to external causes. Ranking updates cartservice_latency as top1.

Cartservice latency.p90 anomaly (30-60s) indicates internal latency. Workload logs confirm pressure. Frontend and paymentservice show secondary metrics anomalies.
